summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of TradeLife login page visual refinements. All wordmark styling, form functionality, and UI elements working perfectly.
passed_tests: Login page loads at /login without errors
TradeLife wordmark displays with Playfair Display italic serif font (font-weight: 500)
Wordmark text has visible gradient styling (white→cool blue gradient working correctly)
Tagline 'Built for trades' visible with decorative lines on each side
Email input field works (can type into it)
Password input field works (can type into it)
Password visibility toggle works correctly (changes type from password to text)
Sign in button is present and clickable
Continue with Google button is present and clickable
No console errors on the login page
Glass panel renders correctly with dark translucent background
All visual refinement effects present: environmental cool/warm influence, core glow, horizontal flare, flare bloom
Cinematic light-bleed glow effects working (multiple drop-shadow filters applied)
